class.description: Visibility-graph global planner. Builds a graph whose vertices are obstacle convex corners (extracted from the costmap) plus the start and goal, whose edges connect mutually visible vertices, and runs A* over it to return a piecewise-straight corner-hugging route. Reasons about obstacle geometry rather than grid cells. Classical (non-learned) and not part of upstream Nav2. Throws NoValidPathCouldBeFound if start and goal are not connected.
